_publications._publicationTitle: CDK4/6-MEK Inhibition in MPNSTs Causes Plasma Cell Infiltration, Sensitization to PD-L1 Blockade, and Tumor Regression.

_contextSnippet: Plasma cells were significantly increased in drug-sensitive tumors relative to vehicle and drug-resistant tumors as well as single agent treated tumors, all of which had few to no plasma cells
details: Plasma cells were significantly increased in drug-sensitive tumors relative to vehicle and drug-resistant tumors as well as single agent treated tumors
